pr.title: ClownCar: Frugendorff compression baseline + canonical DeltaNet integration

output.summary: ClownCar loops a Frugendorff crawler block 4× to trade depth for width while wiring in canonical DeltaNet kernels for a compact 13M transformer.
techniques: Shared Frugendorff crawler block executed across four loops with state-conditioned flow instructions
Canonical DeltaNet + chunk_delta_rule kernels to cut Python loop overhead
Crawler-specific INT8 mode to stabilize shared weights during post-processing
